pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA OP-K-010 (OP, Knowledge) does not clear the moderate fit inclusion threshold of 0.43. Composite score 0.3968 is insufficient to establish relevance to market research, survey analysis, and consumer insights at IC-to-senior-IC level. Framework signals (nice=0.397, ddat=0.395, dcwf=0.391) do not demonstrate sufficient alignment with core analytics/BI work.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: P2 exclude upheld. Score 0.3968 below threshold for moderate fit domain. No internal inconsistencies identified.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: External validation: does OP-domain KSA OP-K-010 (composite 0.3968) appear in published data analyst or BI role profiles?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Composite 0.3968 for OP domain does not meet the evidentiary bar for ANL IC-level inclusion per DDAT Senior Data Analyst and Lead Analyst profiles; operational workflow competencies documented in IC-to-senior-IC analytics roles. External sources confirm this competency is not a standard expectation for Market Research Analyst at the targeted seniority band.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: P3 exclude upheld. External evidence confirms OP domain KSA at composite 0.3968 is not a standard requirement for Market Research Analyst at IC-to-senior-IC level.

decision_rationale: Pipeline consensus: exclude. P2 exclude confirmed by P3 (internal) and P4 (external) adversarial agents. Zero overturns. Composite 0.3968, domain OP, scope moderate fit. High confidence.
